obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Page canvas, full-bleed section backgrounds, hero containers

paper.$description: Paper — Primary text, project labels, navigation links, icon strokes on dark surfaces

frost.$description: Frost — Hairline borders, image outlines, grid dividers, nav separators — the structural linework of the entire interface

smoke.$description: Smoke — Muted secondary text, project descriptions, metadata captions

graphite.$description: Graphite — Muted icon strokes, separators, and secondary graphic details. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

abc-oracle.$description: Sole typeface across the entire site. Weight 100 (ultra-thin) carries the editorial gravitas in display contexts; weight 400 handles navigation and body labels at 13–14px. The custom Dinamo typeface gives Caserne a curatorial, typographic authority that a system sans cannot replicate — the thin cuts and optical adjustments signal a studio that takes type seriously.

obsidian-canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Dominant page background — every section, card, and hero sits on true black

frosted-surface.$description: Surface level 2: Hairline outline layer — 1px borders delineating images, cards, and grid cells against the black canvas
